headline: EOG Resources Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) said it opened 2026 with stronger-than-expected operational and financial results, while shifting more capital toward oil-weighted assets in response to higher crude prices and softer natural gas markets.
